What are your greatest attributes in life? It's the ability to balance. Now, when I say that, this can be applicable to many areas. Me as an entrepreneur on my current level, I have to have the ability to balance my executive tasks, I have to have the ability to problem solve throughout my day to day, I have to have the ability to balance moving the cycles forward, I have to have the ability to go throughout my day, train other people, coach others, answer the questions, generate attention on social media, market. I have to follow up with people. I have to put myself in a position where I go do meetings in person. I have to put myself in a position where I still focus and love myself. I have to work out. I have to read. I have to go to bed at night. I have to have enough sleep. You see all these things I have to eat. Look at the volume of each one of these tasks of how many people can go throughout their day and lack the ability to balance all of these things during their day. Me personally, I broke down a video on time management, why I sectioned my day into four different quadrants, four different seasons, four different quarters if you will, where I handle the different tasks that I personally balance throughout my day to day. Now, I'm going to scale this for you. So, depending on where you're at on the scale, I want you to know that you might be a beginner, you might not have a lot to balance. Your balance might be work, your balance might be coming home at night and doing your side hustle to eventually turn that into your main hustle. It might be family time, it might be you doing some recreational activities still, that you enjoy as hobbies, it might be you doing arts and craft shit, it might be you just talking with somebody, it might be you enjoying family time. It could be anything, it could be everything, but you need to know that everything in your life needs to be kind of quantified, if you will, and then sectioned and not overwhelmed in a particular area. Now, when I say that, this is applying right now, this knowledge is applying to balance you, applying your day to day, but I want to go a little deeper than that. So, in life, you've seen me bring out these three circles and feel our courses so far. And so, we have our physical, we have our mental, and we have our spiritual, we call it our spirit. Now, I'm not going to go deep, I'm not going to talk religion. Me personally, I'm just a spiritual individual, I believe that I have a physical body, I believe that I have a mentality, I have a mental self, I believe that I have more of my God-like self, that I have more of my spirit, that I have more of my truth, that I have more of my ultimate wisdom, if you will, where I truly operate from. And in my day to day, I personally find that I focus on things and actually balance my day with things that nourish me in these three areas. I don't ever go a day basing it on the reality I live in, on the things that I need to balance throughout my day, like executive stuff and training and all that fun stuff. At the end of the day, how I really break down all of these tasks is by the ability to balance which one of my tasks relates to the physical benefit of myself, which series of tasks relates to the mental benefit, which one relates to nourishment, being able to grow and stay aligned, being able to operate and stay declared, which one takes that fog out of my day to day. And what's like the bigger picture in all of this? What's like the purpose, what's the fulfillment, like what's the truth, who am I helping, like what am I doing to grow myself on a spiritual level, to benefit the oneness of everything, you know, what am I doing to stay aligned with this and what am I doing every day to make sure that I'm literally focusing on all three and not just one or the other. So many people in life, you know, like I saw it growing up in Ohio, factory workers would go throughout their day, they do nothing to nourish themselves mentally, maybe they were in a hypnosis and they were focusing on something spiritually I wasn't aware of, but either way, all I saw was a bunch of physical labor going on, people on a conveyor belt, just going like this, just one thing to another, I watched my father do it for 40 years, just going like this, that's it, all physical, there's no benefit to them and then eventually they get so overwhelmed. Some people, if we represent their three circles, they're just so small, they're so overwhelmed in a particular area. What do you do if you're like this? What do you do if you recognize that you have the scrawnyest little body in the world, but you're the most intellectual person, but you talk nothing about God. You know, what do you do when you look like this? Or what do you do if you have, once again, a scrawny little body, you're unhealthy, you're doing a bunch of LSD and you're relating none of that to intellectual concepts, or you're relating none of that to the mental nourishment of yourself, but because you're taking a ton of LSD and because you're focusing on a lot of awesome stuff, dude, your spirit and like your knowledge on oneness in the universe is crazy, like you could talk to us all day about that. And what happens? Who do you know that fits these profiles, whether overwhelmed or overbalanced in one of these areas? There's a guy on YouTube now who's on Facebook, you may have seen him in the long orange hair, he's making fun of people like this. What I'm trying to tell you is, balance is very clear. What I'm trying to tell you is, is that the things you do in a day, the tasks that this person is going to do are completely different than the tasks that that person is going to do, or that this person is going to do. The conversations that these people are going to be different. Now check this out, the conversation that these people hold, how do you think they're going to go throughout the day? These people are going to be able to see everything on each one of these conscious levels. These people are going to be able to stay aligned, they're going to be able to stay balanced, they're going to be able to stay in a synchronicity, they're going to be able to stay in alignment, they're going to be able to have the ability on a very quick basis, on a very rapid basis to call forth mass. This is some esoteric wisdom I've given you in a simple form, which is understanding that if you understand that you're physical, you're mental, and you're spiritual self, something that you need to build upon every day, not just overwhelm yourself in a particular area and live in the profiles that I've just described, you're going to allow yourself to prop in.
